headline: Baird Names Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) a Fresh Pick
summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) is one of the 11 Best American Bank Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On March 9, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) received a “Fresh Pick” designation from Baird. The research firm maintained its Outperform rating with a $20 price target on the stock. According to Baird, the recent weakness […]

headline: Here's What to Expect From Huntington Bancshares' Next Earnings Report
summary: Huntington Bancshares will release its first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a single-digit bottom-line growth.
